text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English. In this podcast, we have real conversations in easy English to help you understand.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听《Real Easy English》。在这个播客节目中，我们用简单的英语进行真实对话，帮助大家理解。

text: I'm Neil. And I'm Beth. You can watch a video of this podcast
zh: 我是尼尔。我是贝丝。你可以观看这个播客的视频，

text: and find a worksheet to help you learn on our website bbclearningenglish .com
zh: 还可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上找到帮助你学习的练习表。

text: Beth, how are you today? I'm very good, Neil. How are you? I'm very well.
zh: 贝丝，你今天好吗？我很好，尼尔，你呢？我也很好。

text: What are we talking about? Today we are talking about work and the office.
zh: 我们今天聊什么呢？今天我们聊聊工作和办公室。

text: An office is a place with desks and computers where people do their jobs.
zh: 办公室是一个有桌子和电脑、人们在那里工作的地方。

text: OK. We are in a studio in the office, but we'll go back to the office after
zh: 好的。我们现在在办公室里的一个录音室，不过录完之后

text: this. Yes, we will. So, Neil, where do you work?
zh: 我们会回到办公室去。是的，会的。那么，尼尔，你在哪里工作？

text: Do you work at home or do you work in the office? Well, I do both of those things.
zh: 你是在家工作还是在办公室工作？嗯，我两种都做。

text: I work in the office usually three days a week
zh: 我通常一周有三天在办公室工作，

text: and I work from home two days a week. OK. I'm the same.
zh: 另外两天在家工作。好的，我也一样。

text: We have the same schedule. So, yeah, at home twice where
zh: 我们的安排一样。所以呢，在家的那两天，

text: I have a sort of place that could be considered a home office.
zh: 我有一个可以算作家庭办公室的地方。

text: Do you like working in the office? I do like working in the office.
zh: 你喜欢在办公室工作吗？我确实喜欢在办公室工作。

text: I think it's easy to get work done in the office because it's an office environment.
zh: 我觉得在办公室更容易把工作做好，因为那是一种办公氛围。

text: It's a workplace. But I also quite like working from home sometimes because
zh: 那是一个工作场所。不过我有时也挺喜欢在家工作，因为

text: commuting, London is a big city, you know, coming to work and going back is really tiring if you do it every day.
zh: 通勤——伦敦是个大城市，你知道的——如果每天都要来回上下班，会很累人。

text: Yeah, I know what you mean. I like working from home
zh: 是的，我明白你的意思。我偶尔也喜欢在家工作，

text: occasionally, but I definitely prefer being in the office.
zh: 但我肯定更喜欢在办公室。

text: I think being with colleagues around you and I need people and then I can work better.
zh: 我觉得身边有同事在，我需要有人在场，这样我才能更好地工作。

text: Yeah. So what's wrong with working from home? Oh, a lot.
zh: 是啊。那在家工作有什么不好呢？哦，问题可多了。

text: I think when you're in the office, yeah, it's louder than at home, home.
zh: 我觉得在办公室里，嗯，会比在家里更吵一些。

text: But I like having the people around me. I like being able to have conversations.
zh: 但我喜欢身边有人。我喜欢能够和人交谈。

text: I find it's easier to work in an office environment because everyone else is working.
zh: 我发现在办公室环境里工作更容易，因为其他人也都在工作。

text: But I feel more lonely at home because it's just me.
zh: 但在家里我会觉得更孤独，因为只有我一个人。

text: So, Yeah, I understand what you mean.
zh: 嗯，我明白你的意思。

text: I also have a bit of a problem with working from home
zh: 我对在家工作也有点意见，

text: because the boundary or the line between work and home is not so clear
zh: 因为工作和生活之间的界限不太清楚，

text: so when you finish your day you close your computer and you think oh hang on
zh: 所以当你结束一天的工作、关上电脑的时候，你会想，哦等等，

text: i'm still at home this is where i've been working all day and sometimes you feel like you should be doing things for home when you're actually working
zh: 我还在家里啊，这就是我一整天工作的地方，有时候你明明在工作，却觉得自己应该去做点家务事。

text: Yeah, it's a bit weirder. Like, it's strange being at home because
zh: 是啊，这感觉有点奇怪。在家里挺怪的，因为

text: it's harder to know whether you should be working or doing a bit of housework.
zh: 你很难分清自己到底该工作还是该做点家务。

text: In the office, it's easier to just sit, be with your laptop, be with your colleagues and just be working.
zh: 在办公室里就简单多了，坐下来，用你的笔记本电脑，和同事在一起，专心工作就好。

text: Have you ever worked somewhere that is not an office? Yes, so I used to work at a farm.
zh: 你有没有在非办公室的地方工作过？有，我以前在一个农场工作过。

text: It was a farm park, so lots of children playing and there was a cafe, there was a play area,
zh: 那是一个农场公园，有很多孩子在玩耍，还有咖啡馆，有游乐区，

text: go -karts, being with animals, so lots of different areas and it was fun, lots of variety.
zh: 有卡丁车，还能和动物在一起，有很多不同的区域，很有趣，很多样化。

text: So that wasn't an office. What about you? I've worked in all kinds of places, especially when I was a student.
zh: 所以那不是办公室。你呢？我做过各种各样的工作，尤其是我还是学生的时候。

text: I worked in factories, farms, I've worked in restaurants,
zh: 我在工厂工作过，在农场工作过，也在餐厅工作过，

text: bars, all kinds of places that are not offices. You've done it all. Done it all!
zh: 还有酒吧，各种各样不是办公室的地方。你真是什么都做过。什么都做过！

text: Let's recap some of the vocabulary we heard in this podcast.
zh: 让我们来回顾一下这期播客中出现的一些词汇。

text: We had office, a place with desks and computers where people go to work.
zh: 我们讲到了office（办公室），指的是有桌子和电脑、人们去工作的地方。

text: Sometimes at BBC BBC Learning English, we work in the office.
zh: 有时候在BBC Learning English，我们就是在办公室工作。

text: We had working remotely, which we often also call working from home.
zh: 我们还讲到了working remotely（远程工作），也常被称为working from home（在家工作）。

text: And that means working somewhere that isn't the office, for example your home, but it could also be a café or something.
zh: 意思是在办公室以外的地方工作，比如你的家，但也可能是咖啡馆之类的地方。

text: We also had colleagues, these are the people that you work with.
zh: 我们还讲到了colleagues（同事），指的是和你一起工作的人。

text: And we compared working from home with working from an office and we used lots of comparatives,
zh: 我们还比较了在家工作和在办公室工作，用了很多比较级，

text: so it's harder to concentrate at home or it's more difficult to get your work done in the office.
zh: 比如在家更难集中注意力，或者在办公室完成工作更难一些。

text: Yes, and it's louder in the office, but sometimes that's better. That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 是的，办公室里更吵一点，但有时候这反而更好。这就是本期《Real Easy English》的全部内容了。

text: You can test what you've learned with a worksheet, which you can download for free from our website bbclearningenglish .com. Bye!
zh: 你可以通过我们网站bbclearningenglish.com上可以免费下载的练习表来检验一下自己学到了什么。再见！
